summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT has chord diagram for n=6 with YELLOW vertices, BLUE chords, RED interior intersections. RIGHT has the V-E+F Euler derivation revealed via ValueTracker step_tr + always_redraw — 5 identity lines building R_n = 1 + C(n,2) + C(n,4); final numeric check V=21, E=36, F=17, R_6=16.
